prompt: Deep investigate DREVEX EU, s.r.o. (ICO 36835463) — a furniture manufacturer from Prievidza with 913K EUR in CRZ contracts. One of their contracts (212K EUR amendment) is just below the EU procurement threshold (215K). Run db-only scope (Phases 1-2 only, no browser).

assertions.name: maps_contracts
assertions.text: Queries all CRZ contracts for ICO 36835463 with amounts and dates

assertions.name: flags_threshold_gaming
assertions.text: Identifies or notes the threshold gaming pattern (212K near 215K EU limit)

assertions.name: checks_extractions
assertions.text: Queries extraction data for hidden entities and contract details

assertions.name: applies_phase_gate
assertions.text: After Phases 1-2, assesses whether deeper investigation is warranted based on findings
